 (C) is a proteolytic enzyme found in gastric juice of infants which helps in the digestion of milk proteins.
 Fatty acids and glycerol being insoluble, cannot be absorbed into the blood. They are first incorporated into small droplets called (D) which move into the intestinal mucosa. They are re-formed into very small protein coated fat globules called the (E) which are transported into the lymph vessels (lacteals) in the villi.

 Defaecation is ____(1)____ process and is carried out by ____(2)____ peristaltic movement.

 The activities of the gastrointestinal tract are under ____(4)____ and ____(5)____ control.
 Salivary glands are situated just ____(6)____ the buccal cavity and secrete salivary juice into the buccal cavity.
 Rennin is a ____(7)____ enzyme found in the gastric juice of infants.
 
 1 - Involuntary, 2 - Mass, 3 - Small intestine
 2 -Reverse, 3 - Small intestine, 4 -Neural
 1 -Voluntary, 7 -Proteolytic
 4-Neural, 5-Hormonal; 2-Inside
questions.question_html:

  1. Defaecation is ____(1)____ process and is carried out by ____(2)____ peristaltic movement.

  3. The activities of the gastrointestinal tract are under ____(4)____ and ____(5)____ control.
  4. Salivary glands are situated just ____(6)____ the buccal cavity and secrete salivary juice into the buccal cavity.
  5. Rennin is a ____(7)____ enzyme found in the gastric juice of infants.
    1. 1 - Involuntary, 2 - Mass, 3 - Small intestine
    2. 2 -Reverse, 3 - Small intestine, 4 -Neural
    3. 1 -Voluntary, 7 -Proteolytic
    4. 4-Neural, 5-Hormonal; 2-Inside
